## Public-Safe Check

- [ ] No private hostnames, usernames, account names, allocation names, tokens,
      or internal project identifiers.
- [ ] No private storage paths, dataset names, support tickets, or incident
      details.
- [ ] No unpublished security, identity-management, quota, accounting, or node
      operations procedures.
